changes.change: Wall tile visibility: brightened tile back texture (#C8B888 → #FAF6EC), darkened inner playing area (0xE8D4A8 → 0xD8C498), increased wall tile scale (0.78 → 0.82), reduced wall shadow opacity (0.35 → 0.22), wider lattice lines on backs

Removed duplicate bottom-right toolbar (was identical to top-right). Wired up Settings button to open settings overlay modal. Added openSettings/closeSettings methods with close-on-overlay-click. Single clean toolbar in top-right only, matching mockup layout.

Wall tiles more prominent: scale 0.82→0.90, layer gap 0.10→0.04 (tighter stacking), wallDist 3.8→3.6 (closer to center), shadow opacity 0.22→0.30, tile depth D 0.40→0.45. Walls now clearly frame the playing area.

notes: Round 5 — POLISH ONLY. Do NOT change tile back color (green #3B7A5A). Do NOT change side color (dark brown #7A6240). Do NOT change camera (y6 z9). Focus: wall visibility, composition, UI cleanup, overall mockup match.
